message:
feat: causal DAG with transfer entropy for inter-agent dependency discovery (wa-283h4.1)

Implement Schreiber (2000) transfer entropy to detect directed causal
relationships between panes. Includes histogram-based TE estimation,
deterministic permutation significance testing, BFS graph traversal
for cascade prediction, and serializable DAG snapshots.

22 unit tests, 6 proptests, criterion benchmarks (3 groups).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
